summary: Completed testing PlumbPro Phase 3 features: PWA service worker and manifest files are working perfectly. However, critical authentication session management issue prevents testing of authenticated features (GPS Clock In, Export PDF, Email to Client buttons).

ui_bugs.issue: User sessions expire immediately after login - users get redirected back to login page when trying to navigate to any authenticated page (timesheet, bidding, settings)

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access timesheet, bidding, or settings pages due to immediate session expiration

passed_tests: User registration works correctly when all fields are filled
Initial login works and reaches dashboard briefly
PWA service worker file exists at /sw.js and loads correctly
Service worker contains all required event listeners (install, activate, fetch, push, sync)
PWA manifest file exists at /manifest.json and is valid JSON
Manifest contains all required PWA fields (name, icons, display mode, theme colors)
Manifest includes 4 app shortcuts for quick access
Capacitor config file exists with proper Android configuration

success_percentage.backend: Not tested due to authentication issues

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix authentication session management - users cannot stay logged in to test Phase 3 features. Sessions expire immediately after login, preventing access to timesheet (GPS Clock In, Export PDF), bidding (Email to Client), and settings pages. This is the same issue from iteration_2 that needs urgent resolution.
